intentSynonyms: look up product suggestions in uber
fetch a single product suggestions in uber
view one specific product suggestions in uber
get available uber products and services in uber
description: Get available Uber products and services (Ride, Reserve, Courier, Hourly, Rental Cars, Food, Grocery). Returns product names with descriptions and launch URLs.

type.description: Suggestion type — DEFAULT shows all products, CUSTOM shows personalized order. Default DEFAULT.
